q: Given below are two statements : Statement ( $I$ ) : Planck' $s$ constant and angular momentum have same dimensions. Statement (II) : Linear momentum and moment of force have same dimensions. In the light of the above statements, choose the correct answer from the options given below :
options: Statement $I$ is true but Statement II is false
Both Statement $I$ and Statement II are false
Both Statement $I$ and Statement II are true
Statement $I$ is false but Statement II is true
explanation: [ h ] = ML 2 $T-1$ [L] = ML 2 $T-1 [$ P $]=MLT-1 [ \tau ]=ML 2$ T $-2 (Here h is Planck'$ s $constant,$ L $is angular momentum,$ P $is linear momentum and \tau is moment of force$ )
